items.name: 🎀「Marshmallow Duffle Coat [PBR]」
items.description:
A sweet pastel duffle coat that feels as soft as a marshmallow.
Its rosy pink hue and classic toggle buttons bring a playful charm to winter outfits, while the hood keeps you warm and ready for chilly adventures.
✨ Features
Fluffy pink coat with toggle closures
Cute and cozy pastel winter style
Great for casual, kawaii, or cozy looks
PBR textures for soft fabric realism
🔍 Keywords: pastel coat, duffle coat, cute, cozy, kawaii, winter
